meta.note: No full chief-architect-repo-understanding audit has been run yet as of this file's creation. Everything below is seeded from incidental verification during Phase 20/21 execution and the apps/web episode, not a systematic pass. Treat unlisted areas as unknown, not as 'checked and fine'.

architecture.notes: Owns all state, persistence, orchestration. Feature modules under src/features/. Real jest suite, 298 suites / 3154 tests passing as of last run.
Stateless analysis service. Receives fully-assembled requests from backend, never queries a DB directly. Real mastery/retention/recommendation logic ported in during Phase 20 (P20-007/008/009).

Marked reference-only as of P20-015. Held the original weighted-mastery/retention/recommendation algorithms later ported into services/aim-engine. Not verified whether zero live imports remain repo-wide as of this memory's creation -- last explicit check was during P20-007/008/009 work, not re-verified since.
Real Flutter SDK pinned via .metadata (3.44.1 / Dart 3.12.1 at last check). 838 tests passing as of last full run. Voice Teacher + AI Teacher chat unified onto ai_chat_messages as of Phase 21.
Has its own admin/notifications, admin/analytics, admin/ai-teacher sections -- confirmed to overlap with apps/web's admin-* features.
Has its own CI workflow (student-web.yml). No parent-dashboard equivalent found inside it.

~132-144 files: Parent Dashboard (billing/reports/checkout/notifications) + admin-notifications/admin-ai/admin-analytics + a status page. NO CI workflow exists for it (unlike admin-dashboard.yml and student-web.yml). Deleted on chore/remove-apps-web (merged PR #1306), then restored verbatim on chore/restore-apps-web from archive/apps-web-backup after the user asked to restore it. As of last check, current state on main depends on whether chore/restore-apps-web has since been merged -- re-verify before assuming either way. Admin-* features here likely duplicate apps/admin-dashboard's; parent-dashboard has no known equivalent elsewhere in this repo.

Fixed 2026-07-04, same migration -- notable since this table drives course-gating decisions.

Deployed via mcp__Supabase__apply_migration in this environment (no local DATABASE_URL available; npx prisma migrate deploy was the documented house-style command but not what was actually run in this session). schema.prisma kept in sync manually after each apply.

apis.contract_sync_status: aim-engine-contract.spec.ts confirmed to already cover all P20-005..P20-009 request/response field additions as of P20-016 (skill_mastery_context, recentAttempts, retentionHistory, etc.) -- verified by direct reading, not just trusting a doc.

ported_modules.name: RecommendationEngine (12-action cascade)
ported_modules.notes: Ported P20-009; response schema kind enum stayed 3-value, mapped down from the 12 action types via _ACTION_TYPE_TO_KIND_REASON in aim_analysis_pipeline.py.

ai_engine.services_api_status: Documented reference-only as of P20-015. Not independently re-verified in this session that zero live imports remain repo-wide.

decisions_log.decision: Git identity for all commits/pushes on this repo is GHOST3030 / ahmedalalawi41@gmail.com, never Claude/Anthropic attribution.
decisions_log.context: Set explicitly at start of Phase 21 work; applies to all subsequent sessions.

decisions_log.decision: Agent must never open PRs -- user opens/merges all PRs manually.
Any multi-task batch of work must be fully tested (build + full test suite) before pushing; failures must not be discovered after landing.

Enable RLS on the 8 previously-exposed tables (student_learning_goals, daily_challenge_templates, admin_broadcast_schedules, achievement_definitions, student_achievements, xp_levels, student_level_state, ai_focus_directives), applied live and committed as a migration.
decisions_log.context: Confirmed via AskUserQuestion before applying to the live Supabase project; no permissive policies added, matching the existing default-deny pattern.

decisions_log.decision: Reconcile _prisma_migrations for the 11 migrations applied out-of-band via mcp__Supabase__apply_migration but never recorded in the Prisma ledger.
decisions_log.made_by: agent (user approved the batch of 3 fixes)
decisions_log.context: Done alongside the RLS fix and the backend.env untracking, in the same session.

decisions_log.decision: Stop tracking services/backend-api/backend.env (contained a live Supabase service-role key, DB URL, JWT secret, AI/STT provider keys); harden .gitignore with *.env / !.env.example.
decisions_log.context: The exposed keys remain in git history and still need rotation -- not done, only the tracking was stopped.

decisions_log.decision: Installed Flutter 3.44.1 / Dart 3.12.1 (exact match to apps/mobile/.metadata's pinned hash) into this environment at /opt/flutter, added to PATH persistently.
decisions_log.context: Closed the 'mobile test pass/fail count Unknown' gap from the full inventory -- 838/838 tests confirmed passing.

phase_history.notes: All 23 tasks merged to main via individual PRs (#1278-#1302 range, plus #1294 for P20-016). P20-016 (contract test + e2e smoke test) confirmed the root-cause pipeline fix actually works end-to-end.

phase_history.source_doc: local planning file (not committed to repo): phase21fluttervoicesynctasks.md, uploaded by user
phase_history.notes: Executed in two batches: P21-001..010 (PR #1303) and P21-011..021 (PR #1304). A follow-up task P21-021b (not in the original plan) fixed a real latent bug found while decoupling voice_audio_assets from voice_messages: AudioUploadService was still checking session ownership against the frozen voice_sessions table. Merged as PR #1305. Note: one background-agent run during this phase reported completion prematurely while still actively working -- verify agent completion claims against actual git log/status, don't trust the report alone.

known_issues.summary: VoicePlaybackNotifier.loadAndPlay fetched real synthesized audio from the backend successfully but never actually played it through any audio output; stop()/pause()/resume() mutated state without controlling real playback either. Same class of bug as the pre-PR-1310 microphone gap. Found during the Project Brain gap audit -- the original full-inventory pass verified mic capture in depth but not playback.
known_issues.fixed_in: PR #1314 (adds audioplayers package, RealVoicePlayerClient); 12 new tests, mobile suite now 850/850.

known_issues.summary: Voice Teacher's mic capture (PR #1310) and audio playback (PR #1314) are both real code paths, but neither has been verified with actual audio hardware/a real device or emulator -- both fixing commits explicitly disclaim this in their own commit messages.
known_issues.found_at: 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z (surfaced during the Project Brain gap audit)

known_issues.summary: voice_audio_assets.message_id (FK to legacy voice_messages) made nullable; new rows use ai_chat_message_id instead.

AudioUploadService checked ownership against voice_sessions, which stopped receiving new rows as of P21-007 -- would 403 every upload for a post-P21-007 session once VoiceMessageSubmitModule gets wired into the live app (it is currently NOT wired into VoiceTeacherModule, so this was latent, not an active incident).
8 tables had RLS disabled and were fully exposed to anon/authenticated Supabase roles (see database.rls_status above).
services/backend-api/backend.env was tracked in git and contained a real Supabase service-role key, DATABASE_URL, JWT secret, and AI/STT provider keys.
known_issues.fixed_in: git rm --cached + .gitignore hardening (*.env / !.env.example) this session -- the exposed keys remain in git history and still need rotation, which was NOT done.

known_issues.summary: 11 migrations (achievements through the 2026-07-04 voice/chat schema changes) were applied to the live DB via mcp__Supabase__apply_migration but were missing from _prisma_migrations, meaning prisma migrate deploy would have tried to re-run already-applied SQL.
known_issues.fixed_in: Real sha256 checksums inserted into _prisma_migrations this session, matching each migration's actual .sql file.

known_issues.summary: services/api is NOT reference-only as PROJECT_STATE.md/project-memory.json previously (and still, pending this update) claimed -- services/aim-engine live-imports 6 domain services from services/api/src/aim/domain/services/* via a sys.path hack at runtime. This is a real, current dependency, not dead reference code.
known_issues.status: open (documentation/architecture-boundary question, not a bug -- flagging that the 'reference-only' framing across multiple docs is stale)

known_issues.summary: VoiceMessageSubmitModule and 4 other services (AiTeacherFallbackService, AnswerSubmissionService, QuestionDeliveryService in assessments, ParentAccessAuditService, AudioUploadSafeFailureService) are built but never imported by any module -- confirmed by exhaustive grep across every *.module.ts this session.
known_issues.status: open -- VoiceMessageSubmitModule is self-documented as intentionally unwired pending a future controller (P9-068+); the other 4 orphans are not documented as intentional.

known_issues.summary: NotificationDeliveryWorker.processQueue() is registered as a provider and exercised only in unit tests -- no cron or controller in production code actually calls it. Notifications get enqueued (DB row written) but nothing dispatches them. Compounded by push/email adapters both being no-op stubs (NoopPushProviderAdapter/NoopEmailProviderAdapter) with no real FCM/APNs/SMTP/SendGrid SDK anywhere in the codebase.

PAYMENT_PROVIDER_ADAPTER is bound to a literal empty object ({}) in billing.module.ts. The interface is Stripe-shaped but no Stripe SDK or any other payment SDK import exists anywhere outside test mocks. Calling any adapter method at runtime would throw.

notifications/parents backend controllers hardcode their own api/v1/... prefix while every other controller is bare (no global prefix set). No single REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL value makes both groups resolve correctly at once. This reopens the old AUDIT_REPORT.md TASK-3 concern thought previously fixed.
known_issues.status: open -- whether this is actually broken in the deployed environment depends on the real env var value, which is Unknown from the repo alone.

known_issues.summary: .github/dependabotggggggg.yml has a typo'd filename so GitHub never actually reads it as a dependabot config; it still references a directory: "/apps/web" entry for npm ecosystem monitoring.
apps/web has no CI workflow at all, unlike admin-dashboard and student-web.

open_questions.question: Is apps/web's Parent Dashboard actually the live, in-production parent-facing UI, or has it already been superseded by something outside this repo?
Current merge state of chore/restore-apps-web -- was it merged after being pushed?
Does services/api genuinely have zero live imports repo-wide today, or has that drifted since P20-015/017?

prisma generate fails in this sandbox environment due to a @prisma/client@7.8.0 vs prisma@6.19.3 version mismatch -- is this environment-specific or does it affect real deploys? App uses raw pg queries via DatabaseService, so it hasn't blocked anything yet.

environment.note: Not systematically audited yet. Only incidentally confirmed: services/backend-api requires DATABASE_URL for prisma CLI operations (not required for the app itself, which uses raw pg via DatabaseService); AIM_ENGINE_SERVICE_TOKEN, STT/TTS provider keys required for some backend e2e test setups (test-only placeholder values used in test env).

ci_cd.notes: List of workflow filenames only -- contents/triggers of each not individually audited yet.

change_log.summary: Ran a gap audit comparing docs/project-brain/*.md against current origin/main (which had moved ahead by one merged PR, #1314, 'Wire the Voice Teacher screen to real audio playback', since the Brain was authored). Found 11 gaps (0 Critical, 0 High, 5 Medium, 6 Low), the most significant being that Voice Teacher audio playback was a state-only bug of the same class as the pre-PR-1310 microphone gap, now fixed but never logged. Also corrected stale test counts (mobile 838->850, backend 3158->3163) discovered during re-verification. Saved as docs/project-brain/GAP-AUDIT.md.
